\begin{document}

\section{A common language for production networks}

Let there be $J$ industries. Index a using industry by $i$ and a supplying
industry by $j$, and let $\Omega$ use the user-by-supplier convention. Define
the Leontief object and its path expansion by

\begin{equation}
  \mathcal{L}=(I-\Omega)^{-1}=I+\Omega+\Omega^2+\cdots
  \label{eq:leontief}
\end{equation}

Here $I$ is the identity matrix and $(\Omega^n)_{ij}$ collects length-$n$ paths.

\end{document}
